overall_reasoning: Markets are opening on May 1st with the portfolio in strong shape — up ~10% overall with well-diversified positions. Key developments: QCOM soared 15% on stellar Q2 earnings (currently underweight at 4.1%), LLY raised full-year guidance on GLP-1 strength (positive), ABBV upgraded by BofA with strong Skyrizi momentum, XOM beat Q1 estimates, and Visa captured 90% of crypto card spending surge. The portfolio is 99.3% invested with minimal cash. Strategy: add to QCOM on the earnings breakout, consider trimming positions near max weight to fund higher-conviction opportunities, and hold core positions in GOOGL and AMZN which are performing well. Being early in the trading day (run 1 of ~13), I'll be selective and pace trades carefully.
